changeSet.author: openelis-bioequivalence

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Sample Receiver'

changeSet.comment: Add Bioequivalence Sample Receiver role for bioequivalence sample reception (Stage 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Receives and registers biological samples for bioequivalence testing

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-bioequivalence

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Chemical Analyst'

changeSet.comment: Add Bioequivalence Chemical Analyst role for bioequivalence testing and analysis

column.name: description
column.value: Performs chemical analysis, method validation, and data interpretation

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-bioequivalence

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Pharmacist'

changeSet.comment: Add Bioequivalence Pharmacist role for bioequivalence pharmaceutical validation

column.name: description
column.value: Validates pharmaceutical quality and bioequivalence studies

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-bioequivalence

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Researcher'

changeSet.comment: Add Bioequivalence Researcher role for bioequivalence research and method development

column.name: description
column.value: Conducts bioequivalence research and method development

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-bioequivalence

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Lab Supervisor'

changeSet.comment: Add Bioequivalence Lab Supervisor role for bioequivalence laboratory supervision

column.name: description
column.value: Supervises laboratory operations and approves sample processing

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-bioequivalence

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Study Director'

changeSet.comment: Add Bioequivalence Study Director role for bioequivalence study management

column.name: description
column.value: Manages bioequivalence studies and approves study protocols

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-bioequivalence

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence QA Officer'

changeSet.comment: Add Bioequivalence QA Officer role for bioequivalence quality assurance

column.name: description
column.value: Ensures quality assurance and regulatory compliance

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-bioequivalence

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Data Manager'

changeSet.comment: Add Bioequivalence Data Manager role for bioequivalence data management and reporting

column.name: description
column.value: Manages analytical data and generates reports

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')
